title: AP E-Procurement Mandate — Stores ≥ Rs.1 Lakh
text_english: All MATERIALS / STORES costing more than Rs.{{eproc_stores_threshold}} (default Rs.1,00,000 i.e. Rs.1 Lakh) SHALL BE PROCURED through the e-procurement platform ONLY (apeprocurement.gov.in). This applies to all Departments, Public Sector Undertakings, Societies, Universities, Local Bodies, and Institutions of the Government of Andhra Pradesh, in supersession of any earlier department-specific thresholds. (Source: GO Ms No 258, Finance (TFR) Department, dated 20-09-2013, amending Rule III(7) of Article 125 of AP Financial Code Volume-I.)
